title: GaN Power Semiconductor Supply Bottleneck — EV and AI Tailwinds
thesis_claim: Gallium nitride power semiconductor demand will outpace fab capacity through 2027 due to simultaneous EV charger proliferation and AI data center PDU upgrades, creating structural margin expansion for sub-$50B tier-2 GaN producers.
summary: Three independent supply chain analyses confirm GaN substrate capacity utilization exceeds 90% globally. Two tier-2 fabs have filed provisional patents on new substrate deposition techniques. SEC 10-K filings from major hyperscalers show GaN-specific supplier clauses added in FY2025.
critical_disagreement: Silicon carbide may substitute GaN in some EV applications above 800V, reducing the addressable market by approximately 20%.
research_risks:
• Silicon carbide substitution risk in high-voltage EV applications
• Geopolitical risk: approximately 60% of GaN substrates sourced from China
• Timeline uncertainty for widespread data center PDU GaN adoption

supporting_findings.title: GaN Substrate Capacity Constraints in High-Power Applications
supporting_findings.snippet: Current fab utilization exceeds 92% in top-5 GaN producers, with lead times extending to 52 weeks for MOCVD reactor slots.
supporting_findings.key_quote: Fab utilization exceeds 92% in top-5 GaN producers.

supporting_findings.title: Power Density Roadmap for Next-Generation GaN HEMTs
supporting_findings.snippet: GaN HEMT power density requirements for 400V EV chargers have increased 3.2x over 2022 baselines, straining existing epitaxial deposition capacity.
supporting_findings.key_quote: GaN HEMT power density requirements have increased 3.2x over 2022 baselines.

supporting_findings.title: GaN Supply Chain Under Strain as EV and AI Demand Converge
supporting_findings.snippet: Financial Times analysis of five hyperscaler 10-K filings reveals new GaN-specific supplier qualification clauses, signalling a structural demand shift.
supporting_findings.key_quote: Five hyperscaler 10-K filings contain new GaN-specific supplier qualification clauses.
